title: Fissia pleurothalloides
intro: Fissia pleurothalloides, commonly known as Fissidens or Fissidens pleurothalloides, is a type of epiphytic, liverwort plant that belongs to the family Fissidentaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as arthritis and oxidative stress. Bioactive constituents of Fissia pleurothalloides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Fissia pleurothalloides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
